title: lonicera sempervirens var. virginiana
intro: Lonicera sempervirens var. virginiana, commonly known as the Coral Honeysuckle or Woodbine, is a type of flowering vine native to eastern North America. The plant's medicinal properties include its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Lonicera sempervirens var. virginiana include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
